math_recheck: Re-derived against primary arXiv 1907.00847 LaTeX + numerically confirmed n=1..7: A_n^2=nI, support=cube edges, entries in {-1,0,1}, Tr=0 splits spectrum 2^{n-1}/2^{n-1}, lambda_{2^{n-1}}=sqrt n exactly; interlacing index 1+2^n-(2^{n-1}+1)=2^{n-1} (no off-by-one); brute-forced the theorem on all Q^3 and 2000 Q^4 induced subgraphs (min Delta>=sqrt n, min lambda1(A_H)=sqrt n); verified the det-linearity Cauchy-interlace identity, the Perron-domination strengthening lambda1(|A|)>=lambda1(A), lambda1(K_{1,n})=sqrt n, AND-of-ORs s=sqrt(deg); all cited constants (Tal bs<=deg^2, N-S bs<=2deg^2, Kenyon-Kutin, Rubinstein, C=4) match primary.
